final:
module alu16bit (
    input wire [15:0] A,
    input wire [15:0] B,
    input wire [1:0] ctrl,
    output reg [15:0] sum
);

    always @(*) begin
        case (ctrl)
            2'b00: sum = A + B; // ADD
            2'b01: sum = A - B; // SUB
            2'b10: sum = A & B; // AND
            2'b11: sum = A | B; // OR
            default: sum = 16'b0;
        endcase
    end

endmodule
